records.m_Talk_ENG: Parry! There you are!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! She fell down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! She fell down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! She fell down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My legs feel numb... from walking for too long...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My legs feel numb... from walking for too long...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My legs feel numb... from walking for too long...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here, have some medicinal tea. It'll clear your senses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here, have some medicinal tea. It'll clear your senses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here, have some medicinal tea. It'll clear your senses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Egh! It's so bitter!!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Egh! It's so bitter!!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Egh! It's so bitter!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which means it's effective.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which means it's effective.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which means it's effective.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I couldn't find it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I couldn't find it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I couldn't find it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Find what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Find what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Find what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how much I look around, there is no gap.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how much I look around, there is no gap.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how much I look around, there is no gap.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... It's the same for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... It's the same for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... It's the same for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I tried with all my might to talk to the wall, but I got no response.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I tried with all my might to talk to the wall, but I got no response.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I tried with all my might to talk to the wall, but I got no response.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if we don't give up, our efforts will pay off one day, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if we don't give up, our efforts will pay off one day, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if we don't give up, our efforts will pay off one day, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not giving up is good, but I'm not sure how much time we have left...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not giving up is good, but I'm not sure how much time we have left...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not giving up is good, but I'm not sure how much time we have left...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is it, Parry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is it, Parry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is it, Parry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I smelled something familiar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I smelled something familiar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I smelled something familiar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the scent of that flower tea you made me. It's not that far from here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the scent of that flower tea you made me. It's not that far from here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the scent of that flower tea you made me. It's not that far from here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The flower tea you drank before...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The flower tea you drank before...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The flower tea you drank before...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! You mean the Calendula!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! You mean the Calendula!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! You mean the Calendula!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I've never seen it grow anywhere in the garden ever since Mother left...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I've never seen it grow anywhere in the garden ever since Mother left...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I've never seen it grow anywhere in the garden ever since Mother left...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's over there!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's over there!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's over there!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This place is full of thorny vines.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This place is full of thorny vines.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This place is full of thorny vines.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The smell is coming from in there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The smell is coming from in there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The smell is coming from in there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey, could you move those vines?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey, could you move those vines?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey, could you move those vines?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The roots are too dense. It won't be easy to move them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The roots are too dense. It won't be easy to move them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The roots are too dense. It won't be easy to move them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess there's nothing we can do, then.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess there's nothing we can do, then.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess there's nothing we can do, then.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't go through such a rough place just because of a smell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't go through such a rough place just because of a smell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't go through such a rough place just because of a smell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said... the smell came from in there, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said... the smell came from in there, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said... the smell came from in there, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey? Hey, wait...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey? Hey, wait...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey? Hey, wait...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a field of thorns! Are you seriously planning on walking in there?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a field of thorns! Are you seriously planning on walking in there?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a field of thorns! Are you seriously planning on walking in there?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The smell of Calendula...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The smell of Calendula...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The smell of Calendula...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe that's a clue to where to find Mother!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe that's a clue to where to find Mother!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe that's a clue to where to find Mother!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's just a little bit...! Open the way for us...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's just a little bit...! Open the way for us...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's just a little bit...! Open the way for us...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're already covered in wounds, Solovey! Why are you doing this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're already covered in wounds, Solovey! Why are you doing this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're already covered in wounds, Solovey! Why are you doing this...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't care about my wounds!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't care about my wounds!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't care about my wounds!

records.m_Talk_ENG: For six birthdays...! I haven't seen her once!
records.m_Talk_DEU: For six birthdays...! I haven't seen her once!
records.m_Talk_FRA: For six birthdays...! I haven't seen her once!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know anything! Why she isn't coming home...! Or why the door to the inner yard is blocked...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know anything! Why she isn't coming home...! Or why the door to the inner yard is blocked...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know anything! Why she isn't coming home...! Or why the door to the inner yard is blocked...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wanted to see her so bad, but I promised her I'd wait...! So, I waited all these years!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wanted to see her so bad, but I promised her I'd wait...! So, I waited all these years!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wanted to see her so bad, but I promised her I'd wait...! So, I waited all these years!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I dried the Calendulas that withered after Mother left, and only took them out on my birthday!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I dried the Calendulas that withered after Mother left, and only took them out on my birthday!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I dried the Calendulas that withered after Mother left, and only took them out on my birthday!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I spent years reminding myself of Mother with only that scent!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I spent years reminding myself of Mother with only that scent!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I spent years reminding myself of Mother with only that scent!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I can meet her again...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I can meet her again...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I can meet her again...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then these thorns don't hurt me at all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then these thorns don't hurt me at all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then these thorns don't hurt me at all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Errgh... Ouch... It hurts so much...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Errgh... Ouch... It hurts so much...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Errgh... Ouch... It hurts so much...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hang in there. I've removed most of the thorns now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hang in there. I've removed most of the thorns now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hang in there. I've removed most of the thorns now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, I thought you had transformed into a hedgehog, kid.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, I thought you had transformed into a hedgehog, kid.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, I thought you had transformed into a hedgehog, kid.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sob* *Sniffle*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sob* *Sniffle*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sob* *Sniffle*

records.m_Talk_ENG: They won't leave a scar, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They won't leave a scar, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They won't leave a scar, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're worried about scars after doing something like that? You're lucky to be alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're worried about scars after doing something like that? You're lucky to be alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're worried about scars after doing something like that? You're lucky to be alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. I'm taking another one out from the sole of your foot, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. I'm taking another one out from the sole of your foot, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. I'm taking another one out from the sole of your foot, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: EEEP!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: EEEP!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: EEEP!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank... you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank... you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank... you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look at how puffy your eyes are. It looks like you've cried enough for a lifetime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look at how puffy your eyes are. It looks like you've cried enough for a lifetime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look at how puffy your eyes are. It looks like you've cried enough for a lifetime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe... But still... it was worth it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe... But still... it was worth it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe... But still... it was worth it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because I found this in there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because I found this in there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because I found this in there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was inside the thorn vines?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was inside the thorn vines?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was inside the thorn vines?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It's something Mother always carried around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It's something Mother always carried around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It's something Mother always carried around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never asked what it was, but I'm sure it was something precious to her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never asked what it was, but I'm sure it was something precious to her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never asked what it was, but I'm sure it was something precious to her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look at how puffy your eyes are. It looks like you've cried enough for a lifetime.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Look at how puffy your eyes are. It looks like you've cried enough for a lifetime.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe... But still... it was worth it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because I found this in there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That was inside the thorn vines?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It's something Mother always carried around.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I never asked what it was, but I'm sure it was something precious to her.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I never asked what it was, but I'm sure it was something precious to her.
